title: WaterFrames Computercraft Compat
description: Adds computercraft peripheral support to WaterFrames mod
body:
This is a Simple mod that adds Computercraft: Tweaked peripheral support to [WaterFrames](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterframes). 

With this mod you can change most of the parameters to any of the WaterFrames Displays.

This image shows the currently implemented peripheral functions.
![Peripheral Functions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945ec82472a2d03018de25f4ea861dcc90f6cf71.png)

You could make so many cool programs with this here are some examples:
- a jellyfin client running on a computercraft terminal. The client could get and play movies from the Jellyfin MediaServer.
- a playlist / video request system.
- a YouTube Search system.
